Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a list of 20 open ended thought provoking questions that delve deeper into the rationale behind the process flows potential improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication and performance measurement

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: They explicitly request not to provide any SQL queries just list the questions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process is a smartphone supply chain from market research to distribution and sales forecasting

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to think about open ended questions that can be used to guide analysis process improvement risk mitigation

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So ask Why is market research positioned at start What are the criteria for selecting component suppliers How are lead times accounted What are risk mitigation strategies for component supply How does parallel gateway for components ensure resilience

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What is the decision criteria for the exclusive gateway after quality checks How is rework vs scrap decided What metrics are used to evaluate assembly performance How does packaging and labeling adapt to regional regulations

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does shipping method air vs sea impact cost and carbon footprint What are the trade offs in customs clearance How are distribution centers coordinated How is inventory monitored How is sales forecast integrated with procurement

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: How does feedback loop adjust orders How do we handle demand volatility How does the process incorporate sustainability How do we ensure stakeholder communication across the supply chain

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: How does the process incorporate digital twins or IoT for tracking How do we handle regulatory compliance

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The process includes many potential risks geopolitical Taiwan Japan Korea logistics quality demand

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We could ask about the role of data analytics AI and blockchain in improving transparency

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Also ask about governance risk thresholds and performance metrics lead time fill rate cost carbon

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Also ask about scenario planning supply chain resilience and contingency plans

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must output only a list of questions not provide any SQL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ensure we include all aspects rationale improvements risk management decision making stakeholder communication performance measurement

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide thorough but not too long

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can also ask about the parallel gateway join after distribution tasks Ask about the integration of e commerce vs retail Ask about direct shipments for VIP Ask about balancing cost vs speed Ask about real time visibility

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure to not repeat similar questions and ensure each question is distinct
